visual_findings: The v2 candidate sits on the visible mouth/teeth opening and does not drift into hair, cheeks, nose, eyes, chin, or background.
The v2 candidate is intentionally broader than the old active teeth-only strip because the gold benchmark row maps to CelebAMask-HQ mouth area, not just visible teeth.

Protected overlay reports zero nose overlap and 218 pixels of lip-boundary overlap; the lip-boundary overlap is expected for the benchmark-passing mouth-area route and must be checked again in generated-output QA.
The old active teeth mask remains useful only for a teeth-only row; it is not sufficient evidence for the broader mf70_teeth_mouth_area benchmark target.
next_required_action: Copy the candidate to a v2-specific ComfyUI input filename and run one bounded local generated-output proof with strict whole-image QA. Do not overwrite ComfyUI/input/wave70_mf70_teeth_mask.png.
